    A

    actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class CashierView
    Handles all button presses Switching category, Adding items to order Topping selection Confirm order Clear order
    actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class Main
    Handles button click events.
    actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class ManagerReport
    Handles all button click events and routes actions accordingly.
    actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class ManagerView
    Handles navigation button clicks and switches to the selected panel.
    activeInventory - Variable in class Inventory
    List holding only items with the active status
    activeMenu - Variable in class Menu
    List holding only items with the active status
    activeToppings - Variable in class Toppings
    Table including only elements where the status is 'Active'
    addTopping() - Method in class OrderItem
    Creates a child Topping object.

    D

    Database - Class in Unnamed Package
    Database class handles connection to PSQL database Sets up the credentials for easy connection Requires the follow info: - url - userf

    Default constructor Creates a connection to database
    deleteEmployee(Connection, int) - Method in class Employees
    Deletes the row of the employee holding the input id/\
    deleteItem(Connection, int) - Method in class Inventory
    Deletes an item, not reccomended expept to reduce clutter of items never used previously
    deleteItem(Connection, int) - Method in class Menu
    Given a database connection and item id: Delete the row entry with the related itemid
    deleteItem(Connection, int) - Method in class Toppings
    Allows for deletion of an item.

    updateActiveItems(int, boolean) - Method in class Inventory
    Updates only locally, the list of items considered active
    updateActiveItems(int, boolean) - Method in class Menu

    updateActiveItems(int, boolean) - Method in class Toppings

    Updates first name of employee in database

    Updates the item name of the item with the related input id

    Given a databse connection, unique item identifier, and new price.

    Z

    ZReport - Class in Unnamed Package
    Holds the following top sales data for a given hour: Total Product Sales Total Topping Sales Total Sales Most Popular Product Most Popular Topping
    ZReport(int, double, double, double, String, String) - Constructor for class ZReport
     
    ZReportDAO - Class in Unnamed Package
    Contains specialized methods to communicated with the database and generate ZReport entries.
    ZReportDAO() - Constructor for class ZReportDAO
     
    ZReportPanel - Class in Unnamed Package
    Constructs the JPanel to display the ZReport data within the ManagerView Reports tab
